channel.title: News & Updates on Oval Sports | Cricsal Indoor Cricket
channel.description: Recent content in News & Updates on Oval Sports | Cricsal Indoor Cricket

item.title: Cricsal Launches New Pro Series Bat Range
item.description: Introducing the Pro Series — premium Kashmir Willow bats for serious batters.

item.title: Oval Sports Expands to 20+ Districts
item.description: Cricsal products now available through dealers across 20 districts of Nepal.

item.title: New Helmets Meet BS 7928:2013 Standard
item.description: Our updated helmet range meets international British Standard certification.
